subject: Re: Friday Hours
body:
half day is fine

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> I have been asked by Peg, Cecilia and other
> employees whether Friday is  
> going to be a half day for NYSG/Epstein Interests or
> NAPI or both.  I know  that 
> Peg is taking off on Friday and Peg says a number of
> people at NAPI are  doing 
> so.  On the other hand, we are already off on
> Monday.  Please  let me know how 
> you want to handle the vacation issue.  Thanks.
>  
> Darren
>

half day is fine

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

I have been asked by Peg, Cecilia and other
employees whether Friday is
going to be a half day for NYSG/Epstein Interests or
NAPI or both. I know that
Peg is taking off on Friday and Peg says a number of
people at NAPI are doing
so. On the other hand, we are already off on
Monday. Please let me know how
you want to handle the vacation issue. Thanks.

Darren
